data.acceptance:
1. Schema file(s) created in chosen format (protobuf/flatbuffers/etc) with all 8 core operations defined
2. Event subscription RPC defined in schema
3. Code generation runs without errors for at least 2 target languages
4. Generated code is usable (compiles/imports/no obvious issues)
5. Schema design does not require awkward workarounds to express knots concepts (operations, state transitions, events)
6. Schema passes format-specific validation (e.g., protoc --lint_fatal or equivalent)
